strategy: object-level editable rebuild using native text and native primitive shapes; no full-page raster source overlay
text_inventory: 用自然语言描述你想要的图，
上传图片进行编辑、修改或

visual_inventory.decision: native primitive star, rays, and underline lines
editable rounded rectangles and text icon
editable rounded rectangles and simplified picture icon
native line arrows with manual arrowheads
native rounded card, cube lines, separator, and check bullets
native simplified Discord container, message card, PNG preview, and attachment row
native simplified diagram shapes instead of embedded screenshot
native rounded pill and simplified paperclip
native dashed callout and lightbulb icon

background_strategy.source_consistency: The source background is a plain warm off-white canvas with no complex occluded imagery; it is rebuilt as a native solid slide background.
background_strategy.removed_foreground: None; all visible foreground text, containers, arrows, labels, simplified icons, Discord return panel, PNG preview, attachment row, and takeaway callout are rebuilt as independent editable objects.
background_strategy.comparison_note: Preview preserves the flow layout, color coding, and object placement while simplifying hand-drawn icon details into native primitives.

quality_checks.source_corner_geometry_notes: Large cards and pills use roundRect with 8-20 px source radii; diagram boxes and page background use rect when source is straight-corner or primitive.
quality_checks.font_size_calibration_note: Reduced body/UI/takeaway native font sizes after preview comparison to avoid overflow and match source density.

known_limits: Hand-drawn line wobble and Discord/architecture micro-icon detail are approximated with editable native primitives rather than exact bitmap-style strokes.
The Discord logo, cube, paperclip, and PNG architecture preview are simplified native shapes to keep the page object-level editable.
qa_note: All readable labels are native text; visual structure is reconstructed with editable native shapes and no full-slide source raster.
